series_metadata.series_title: BOARD, COMMISSIONS, COUNCILS AND AUTHORITIES MEETING FILES
series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, meeting subject files, applications, supporting documentation, staff write up and reviews, presentation materials and resolutions, minutes, and other related documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: term of project (if applicable) two years. EXPIRATION OF RETENTION PERIOD: STATE ARCHIVE REVIEW IS REQUIRED following: official meeting minutes, formation and establishment records, bylaws, resolutions, official reports, appointment and designee letters, and reports General Assembly.. ALL OTHER RECORDS IN THIS SERIES: retention period has elapsed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
